name: Graceland Oatmeal Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients except 1/2 cup of the ketchup in a large mixing bowl and mix well.
3. Shape the mixture into a nice, even loaf and place it in a shallow baking dish.
4. Top with the remaining ketchup.
5. Bake for 90 minutes or until well-done.
